creator: iron.udjin@gmail.com
text:
Works, thank you.

[vd] Looking at hwdec h264-nvdec...
[vo/gpu] Loading hwdec drivers for format: 'cuda'
[vo/gpu] Loading hwdec driver 'cuda'
[vd] Trying hardware decoding via h264-nvdec.
[vd] Pixel formats supported by decoder: vdpau cuda yuv420p
[vd] Codec profile: High (0x64)
[vd] Requesting pixfmt 'cuda' from decoder.
[vd] Selected codec: h264 (H.264 / AVC / MPEG-4 AVC / MPEG-4 part 10)

I guess we can close this issue as this problem referencing to experimental driver which is not in the ports tree.
